hero.subtitle: Multi-currency accounts, smart cards, instant transfers and high-yield savings. All from one app you can open in minutes.

info.heading: Everything a bank should be.
info.subtitle: Halo Bank gives you accounts in four currencies, smart cards, instant transfers and high-yield savings, all under a single login.
info.multiCurrencyDesc: Hold USD, EUR, UAH and USD Halo side by side. Convert at live rates, no hidden spread.
info.smartCardsDesc: Issue virtual cards in seconds. Freeze, unfreeze and set monthly limits with one tap.
info.instantTransfersDesc: Move money between accounts, IBANs and cards in real time. Zero fees for internal transfers.

stats.heading: Trusted at scale.
stats.subtitle: Millions of people and businesses bank with Halo every day.

useCases.label: Halo Bank in practice
useCases.heading: Built for everyone
useCases.subtitle: Whether you're managing personal finances, running a company or sitting on idle cash, Halo Bank fits.
useCases.personalDesc: A single account for daily spending, multi-currency travel and effortless savings.
useCases.businessDesc: Corporate accounts, expense cards for the team and bulk payouts in seconds.
useCases.treasuryDesc: Park idle reserves in flexible deposits with up to 8.5% APY. Withdraw any time.
useCases.openDesc: No paperwork, no branch visits. Enter your details, verify your phone, and your bank account is live, with a virtual card ready in your dashboard.

footer.desc: Banking that works for you: accounts, cards, transfers and savings under one app.
footer.tagline: We don't judge your spending. Well, maybe a little. But we still love you. 💜

jokes.0: If our bank were real, we would have already charged a fee for clicking this link.
jokes.1: This section is so classified that even we don't know what it says.
jokes.2: You just found a button that does absolutely nothing. But it felt good to click, right?
jokes.3: Usually, this is where boring legal jargon goes. We decided to just wish you a great day instead.
jokes.4: It seems you're reading the footer. That means you really like our design.
jokes.5: 404: Page not found, but you did find this nice little toast message.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Halo Bank account.
auth.registerSubtitle: Takes 2 minutes. No fees, no hidden charges.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

topbar.allDone: That's all for now. Go make some money 🚀

dashboard.subtitle: Here's a snapshot of your money today.

accountsPage.title: Accounts
accountsPage.subtitle: All your accounts in one place.

cardsPage.title: Cards
cardsPage.subtitle: Manage your virtual and physical cards.
cardsPage.noCards: No cards yet. Issue your first one.

transfersPage.title: Transfers
transfersPage.subtitle: Move money between your accounts or send to anyone.

transactionsPage.title: Transactions
transactionsPage.subtitle: Full history of all your transactions.

savingsPage.title: Savings
savingsPage.subtitle: Grow your money with high-yield deposits.
savingsPage.noDeposits: No deposits yet. Open your first one.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your preferences.
settingsPage.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your Halo Bank account and all data.

notifications.funFactDesc: The first online banking service was launched in 1994. You're basically using technology older than most memes.
notifications.marketInsightDesc: If you invested $1 in Bitcoin in 2010, you'd have enough money to forget your bank password without caring.
notifications.dailyTipDesc: Average person checks their bank balance 4 times a day. If you're on your 5th, we respect the grind.
notifications.didYouKnowDesc: Money is the leading cause of stress worldwide. Close this notification to reduce stress by 0.001%.
notifications.haloCaresDesc: Your balance is looking great today. Or maybe it's not. Either way, we believe in you. 💜
